description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a mature deer, featuring a sleek, muscular body covered in a gradient of brown hues with subtle shading along the flanks and back. Its most prominent feature is a large, symmetrical set of antlers that curve gracefully upward and outward, adding to its majestic appearance. The head is elongated with a narrow snout, large, alert eyes, and pointed ears that stand upright. The legs are slender yet sturdy, ending in clearly defined hooves, and the tail is short and slightly curved downward. The surface texture appears smooth with a matte finish, simulating the look of fur. Overall, the deer exudes a sense of alertness and readiness, as if pausing mid-step in a natural environment.
description: A realistic brown deer with large, curved antlers, pointed ears, and a short tail, standing alert with smooth, matte fur.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical antlers, pointed ears, and narrow face with both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, antler curvature, and slender legs with visible hooves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, short tail, and the spread of the antlers from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite body profile, antler structure, and the positioning of the legs and tail.
